entities.name: TOMATO
entities.description: A vegetable crop (Solanum lycopersicum) that serves as a model plant for climacteric fruit ripening.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where tomato is an important vegetable crop.

entities.name: POTATO
entities.description: A vegetable crop in India, second to tomato in consumption.

entities.name: FRUIT RIPENING
entities.description: A process involving biochemical, physiological, and structural changes in fleshy fruits.

entities.name: CLIMACTERIC FRUIT RIPENING
entities.description: A specific type of fruit ripening process for which tomato is a model plant.

entities.name: TEXTURE
entities.description: A physical attribute of fruit that changes during the ripening process.

entities.name: COLOR
entities.description: A visual attribute of fruit that changes during the ripening process.

entities.name: FLAVOR
entities.description: A taste attribute of fruit that changes during the ripening process.

entities.name: AROMA
entities.description: A scent attribute of fruit that changes during the ripening process.

entities.name: VITAMINS
entities.description: Nutritional components whose levels are altered during fruit ripening.

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANTS
entities.description: Compounds whose levels are altered during fruit ripening.

entities.name: ETHYLENE
entities.description: A gaseous hormone critical for regulating physiological and developmental events and stimulating fruit ripening.

entities.name: FRUIT QUALITY
entities.description: A desirable characteristic of fruit that can be enhanced by understanding ethylene's role in ripening.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced, which can be enhanced by understanding ethylene's role in ripening.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL VALUE
entities.description: The nutrient content of fruit, which can be enhanced by understanding ethylene's role in ripening.
